title: Create events from a request span
scenario: A span carries context shared by multiple events. Request-scoped fields should not be rebuilt by every call site.
instructions: Define RequestSpan and an event method that attaches its request_id and path to a LogEvent.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps log-request-span explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
